scripts.build: npm run build:index && npm run build:decks
scripts.build:decks: npm run build:deck:1 && npm run build:deck:2
scripts.build:deck:1: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist/example-deck-1', { recursive: true, force: true })" && slidev build slides/example-deck-1.md --out ../dist/example-deck-1 --base /example-deck-1/
scripts.build:deck:2: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist/example-deck-2', { recursive: true, force: true })" && slidev build slides/example-deck-2.md --out ../dist/example-deck-2 --base /example-deck-2/
